ddls:
CREATE TABLE "optimization_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization instance */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time of the algorithm in seconds */,
  "conflicts" TEXT /* Number of conflicts encountered */,
  "propagations" TEXT /* Number of propagations executed */,
  "best_solution" INTEGER /* Best solution found during the run */,
  "failures" INTEGER /* Number of failures encountered */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Algorithm parameters used */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration settings used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the optimization instance (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the algorithm */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the algorithm */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the algorithm (e.g., local search, evolutionary) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the algorithm (e.g., optimization, machine learning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "leader" TEXT /* Leader of the project */,
  "members" TEXT /* Members of the project (comma-separated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instance being run */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm being used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project under which the algorithm is tested */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date when the instance was run */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the algorithm was run (e.g., local, cloud, cluster) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id", "algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_instances_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, analyst) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, company) */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Expertise of the user (e.g., optimization, machine learning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the comment */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization instance the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES optimization_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the comparison metric */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm being compared */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instance being evaluated */,
  "comparison_value" REAL /* Value of the comparison metric (e.g., execution time, solution quality) */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the comparison metric (e.g., execution time, solution quality) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the comparison metric (e.g., seconds, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_metrics_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES optimization_instances ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_metrics_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "failure_logs" (
  "failure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each failure log */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization instance that failed */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message describing the failure */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the failure occurred */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error (e.g., runtime, syntax) */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code associated with the failure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("failure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_failure_logs_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES optimization_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm associated with the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the summary */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization instance being summarized */,
  "summary_notes" TEXT /* Summary notes regarding the performance */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Overall performance score of the instance */,
  "success" TEXT /* Success status of the instance (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_summaries_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES optimization_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., algorithm, instance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_tags" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_tags" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "tag_id")
)
